Details: Implement missing headers to protect against clickjacking, MIME-sniffing, and downgrade attacks.

Issue: Sitemap URL is not declared in robots.txt
Recommended Action: Add a "Sitemap: https://example.com/sitemap.xml" directive to your robots.txt file, replacing the URL with your actual sitemap location.

Issue: Missing YouTube profile link on homepage
Recommended Action: Add a visible YouTube icon link in the header or footer navigation that directs to the official channel URL, ensuring it uses the correct brand assets and opens in a new tab.

Issue: Missing X/Twitter profile link on homepage
Recommended Action: Add a visible X/Twitter icon link in the header or footer navigation pointing to the official profile URL, ensuring it opens in a new tab with rel="noopener noreferrer" for security.
